data.title: Bitcoin halving cycles are no longer essential, Bitwise's Matt Hougan says. Traditionally significant, halving is now less impactful due to market changes. Upcoming growth trajectory focuses on ETF flows, regulation, and institutional involvement. The halving's impact declines every 4 years.
data.description: According to Matt Hougan, the Chief Investment Officer at Bitwise Asset Management, the traditional four-year market cycle for crypto is no longer relevant. This shift is due to various factors such as increased spot ETF flows, clearer regulations, and greater institutional involvement in the market. These changes suggest that the typical boom-and-bust pattern driven by halving events is being replaced by a more sustained, long-term growth trend. Hougan highlighted that previous market cycles influenced by halving-induced supply shocks and cyclical crashes are losing their impact. He pointed out that the significance of halving events is diminishing over time, with their effects diminishing every four years. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Amare Global launches Skin to Mind™ skincare line targeting stress signals and bliss signals, for visible skin results and mental well-being.
data.description: Amare Global, known as The Mental Wellness Company®, has introduced innovative formulas designed to address visible stress indicators and enhance feelings of bliss at the skin's surface. These new products aim to deliver noticeable results on the skin and promote internal well-being. The announcement was made in New York on July 25, 2025.

data.title: NCOA praises Senators for introducing S. 2466 re-authorizing low-income Medicare enrollment funding for five years.
data.description: The recent introduction of legislation S. 2466, by Senators Marsha Blackburn and Lisa Blunt Rochester, has been praised by the National Council on Aging (NCOA). The bill proposes a five-year extension of funding for key programs aimed at (mention the programs, if known). This move is significant as it demonstrates bipartisan support for providing essential resources for the aging population. The NCOA commends the Senators for their efforts in ensuring the continuation of these crucial initiatives that impact millions of older adults across the country.

data.title: Mega Matrix enters stablecoin sector with $16M financing as stablecoins move towards institutional growth under regulatory frameworks.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, in New York, it was reported that stablecoins are transitioning from an experimental phase to a phase of institutionalized growth due to the evolving global regulatory frameworks. Mega Matrix Corp. (NYSE American: MPU) has confirmed the finalization of a recent announcement.

data.title: Bayer updates on Elinzanetant for treating hot flashes in menopause; seeks regulatory approval.
data.description: Bayer, located in Whippany, N.J., has released a regulatory update on Elinzanetant, a medication intended for treating moderate to severe hot flashes resulting from menopause. The drug's development is progressing towards addressing this common symptom experienced by menopausal individuals. Elinzanetant aims to provide relief to those facing hot flashes, a significant concern for many women transitioning through menopause. This update signifies Bayer's commitment to addressing menopausal symptoms with innovative solutions.

data.title: Dow Jones rises after surprise data; Tesla's stock surges on robotaxi plans. Market updates by Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Following unexpected economic data, the Dow Jones index exhibited an increase, with Tesla stock also experiencing a boost due to its upcoming launch of a robotaxi service. The market today saw the Dow rise amidst positive prospects for a trade deal and anticipation for the Magnificent Seven Earnings reports. This live coverage highlights the promising developments in the stock market, specifically noting the growth in the Dow and Tesla's success.

data.title: Inventor from Yonkers, NY, developed BOX FAN SOLUTION for wall mounting fans. Innovates fan angling design.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, in Pittsburgh, an inventor from Yonkers, N.Y., shared their creation of the BOX FAN SOLUTION. This specially designed frame allows for the mounting of a box fan on a wall or in the upper corner of a room. The inventor mentioned the added feature of being able to angle the fan downwards for optimal airflow. The innovation aims to enhance the functionality of box fans in indoor spaces.

data.title: ETH leads as money supply hits record high; BTC dips, US crypto inflows reach $60b YTD, ETH could outperform BTC for 6 months.
data.description: Bitcoin experiences a decrease as the recent job data results lower expectations for a Federal Reserve rate cut. The US witnesses a significant surge in cryptocurrency inflows, reaching $60 billion year-to-date. Strategy firm decides to increase preferred stock offering to $2 billion. Tokyo's Quantum Solutions expresses plans to acquire 3,000 bitcoins. Analyst Novogratz suggests that Ethereum may outperform Bitcoin for the next six months. Galaxy initiates the sale of large quantities of bitcoins. BitMine announces intentions for a $2.5 billion stock sale to purchase Ethereum. SOL founder maps out plans for low-latency on-chain trading. WindTree Therapeutics secures $520 million for buying Binance Coin. Bank of America anticipates a $75 billion increase in stablecoin supply. Celestia Foundation acquires $62.5 million worth of TIA. TON Foundation partners with Kingsway to establish a treasury company. Tron Inc. makes entrance into Nasdaq. Christie's introduces a $1 billion real estate division for cryptocurrency transactions. Zircuit launches an AI-driven trading engine. Woo X platform gets hacked for $12 million.

data.title: Skyward Specialty reschedules second quarter earnings call to July 31 at 12 PM EDT.
data.description: Skyward Specialty Insurance Group, Inc.™ (NASDAQ: SKWD) based in Houston, revealed a rescheduling of its second quarter earnings call. The call, initially set for a different date, will now take place on Thursday, July 31 at 12:00 p.m. EDT.

data.title: The Alliance for Aging Research warns against weakening IP protections to improve patient access to lifesaving medicines.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, a report from the Alliance for Aging Research highlighted concerns regarding policy proposals that could undermine intellectual property rights. At a recent gathering of national experts, individual presentations underscored the importance of this issue. The Alliance emphasized the potential negative impact of such proposals, urging policymakers to consider the implications. The report follows discussions at the event earlier this year, where key figures expressed worries about the potential consequences of weakening intellectual property protections on innovation. The Alliance's stance is supported by data that show the significant economic value and job creation associated with strong intellectual property rights. They caution that any changes in this area could hinder progress and innovation in various sectors.

data.title: St. James Gold Corp. (TSX-V: LORD) reinstates trading on TSX Venture Exchange on July 29, 2025.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on July 25, 2025, St. James Gold Corp. shared that their common shares will resume trading on the TSX Venture Exchange around July 29, 2025. The company, identified as St. James and listed as TSXV: LORD, OTCQB: LRDJF, FSE: BVU3, revealed that the Exchange has finalized its evaluation for this reinstatement.
